violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Scoop found stored in bucket with dirty water next to large ice bin at the snack shack. In-use items should be stored where they will not be contaminated.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with waste receptacle as needed. Hand washing sink in the snack shack is not provided with a garbage can for paper towels. Hand washing sinks should be provided with a waste receptacle to dispose of used paper towels.
Fruits and vegetables washed, handling, sink provided (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
